title: Alert Dialog
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Alert Dialog primitive composed from the local Dialog foundation with forced modality, alertdialog popup semantics, model-owned open state, disabled outside dismissal, cancel/close facts, and consumer-owned action facts.

deviations.summary: Open state is a model-owned input and user interactions emit open-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model and return command helpers in response to AlertDialogOpenChange payloads.

deviations.summary: Focus trap, Escape routing, scroll lock, and focus restoration are exposed through the reused Dialog Command helpers rather than hidden inside render helpers.
deviations.rationale: Dialog side effects must stay at Foldkit's Command boundary. The installable view remains pure and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Alert Dialog always renders as modal and suppresses backdrop/outside click dismissal.
deviations.rationale: The Base UI origin omits the modal and pointer-dismissal controls for Alert Dialog and fixes them to blocking confirmation behavior.

deviations.summary: The action part is a typed activation surface that emits an optional consumer fact but does not close or perform destructive work by itself.
deviations.rationale: Alert Dialog should present a confirmation surface; destructive and success behavior belongs in the consuming Foldkit model and update.
